source_meta.source_document: Aequalis Ascend Flex and Shoulder Arthroplasty Solutions

systems.system_notes: Platform shoulder arthroplasty system within the Tornier Aequalis family supporting anatomic shoulder reconstruction.

trays.tray_notes: Official Stryker/Tornier materials support dedicated Aequalis shoulder instrumentation and linked shoulder arthroplasty resources.

components.component_notes: Official materials describe the humeral stem family within the Tornier Aequalis platform.
Official materials describe the anatomic glenoid component family within the platform.
Official materials describe humeral head options for anatomic shoulder arthroplasty.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public Aequalis pages define the implant construct but do not expose a public implant code table in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper brochure, IFU, or technique pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
